SUBJECT: SMARTS: your 60 minute head start...

NAME,

OK, we are re-opening SMARTS today, but you have to be quick... it's only available for the next
24 hours.

GOOD NEWS: due to all the confusion on Friday when we pulled SMARTS off the market, we are going to release it at the original discounted price - so you can save $600.00.

MORE good news: as a member of our Waiting List, we're going to give you a 60 minute head start.
The special link below will go live at 1:00pm eastern time (instead of the 2:00pm release for the general public).

Now here's the BAD NEWS: it will only be available for 24 hours... you have to act before 2:00pm eastern on Tuesday.

Here's your special "head start" link:

http://


best regards,
Andy

P.S. Remember, this offer ends on Tuesday at 2:00pm eastern time. After that, you can't get in at any price. Here's the link again:
